# SCORE Houston training events and workshops catalog

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: SCORE Houston
Resource type: Dynamic training catalog

## BOSS routing summary
Use for SCORE workshops, webinars, seminars, or local Houston entrepreneurship education.

## Important freshness note
Events, dates, prices, instructors, formats, and availability can change. BOSS should route users to the official current listing page instead of relying on stored event details.

## Training topics commonly covered
- Startup planning
- Business plan basics
- Marketing
- Finance and cash flow
- Technology and AI
- Operations and growth

## Best-fit user intents
- Does SCORE Houston have workshops?
- Where can I take a business class?

## Recommended BOSS next action
Ask topic, stage, format preference, and schedule needs. Route to SCORE Houston official page and current listings.
